prompt: Convert pixels into a colored 3D point cloud, projecting each pixel forward in Z per depth, then render from a slightly shifted viewpoint.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform its pixels into a colored 3D point cloud. Utilize image 2 as a depth map, interpreting yellow regions as foreground (shallower Z-depth) and purple regions as background (deeper Z-depth). Project each pixel of image 1 into this 3D space according to its corresponding depth, preserving its original color. Render the resulting colored point cloud from a viewpoint subtly shifted to the right of the original camera, generating a soft parallax effect. Ensure the white text overlays ('CARBS', 'ME', '...ALSO ME') are also integrated as volumetric elements within this 3D point cloud.
objects: Woman in red, rendered as a colored 3D point cloud
Man in plaid shirt, rendered as a colored 3D point cloud
Woman in blue top, rendered as a colored 3D point cloud
Urban background elements, rendered as a colored 3D point cloud
